adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 1.5/3 DGs (DG-127 A shipped + validated PASS, DG-128 A pending, DG-129 A pending)

activeDG.title: Cross-file taint propagation sobre R18 v2 — segundo DG de FASE II
activeDG.predecessor_baseline_11_status: H3-implicit-con-verdict-shift PASS empírico del North Star: SQL injection agent.ts:62 verdict transition INC 0.45 → FP 0.90 con rationale que atestigua conocimiento cross-file del target. R18 v1.1 + v2 combined move la aguja del LLM sobre el caso cross-module que originó el R18 v2 spec.

candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A1_Conservative: Taint metadata mapping en fileContext — anotar en fileContext.importedSymbols qué symbols son known-taint-sources (request.body, req.query, etc.) y qué son known-sinks (db.query, exec, etc.). LLM ve el mapping pero infiere propagation.
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A2_Balanced_RECOMMENDED: Sub-A1 + taint annotations en cross-file signatures — anotar en el signature del target symbol si internamente tiene taint sink patterns (regex sobre body del target function). Ejemplo: `execute() [contains db.query with user input pattern]`.
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A3_Innovative: Full call graph reverse resolution con symbolic taint tracking — DAG de source→sink cross-file completo. Requiere CPG framework (Joern territory).
